articles.title: U.S. Sanctions on Russian Oil Firms May Push India to Rethink Imports
articles.lead: New Delhi, Oct 25: Analysts say that U.S. President Donald Trump's sanctions on Russian oil companies could force India to reconsider its energy import strategy amid rising global tensions.
articles.description: New Delhi, Oct 25: Analysts say that U.S. President Donald Trump's sanctions on Russian oil companies have created significant challenges for India's energy sector. The sanctions target major Russian energy companies that have been key suppliers to India since the Ukraine conflict began. Indian officials are now exploring alternative energy sources while balancing diplomatic relations with both Washington and Moscow. The move could reshape India's energy landscape and affect global oil markets significantly.
articles.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump's sanctions on two major Russian oil companies could force India to reconsider its energy import strategy.
keyPoints: U.S. imposes new sanctions on Russian oil companies supplying to India
India has been major buyer of Russian oil since Ukraine conflict began
Sanctions could disrupt India's energy supply chain significantly
Indian government exploring alternative energy sources and suppliers
Move expected to reshape global oil markets and trade patterns

eKantipur.title: अमेरिकी प्रतिबन्धले भारतीय तेल आयातमा असर
eKantipur.description: काठमाडौं, कार्तिक ९ - अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रम्पको रूसी तेल कम्पनीहरूमाथिको प्रतिबन्धले भारतको ऊर्जा नीतिमा महत्वपूर्ण प्रभाव पार्ने विश्लेषकहरूको भनाइ छ।

Kathmandu Post.title: US sanctions on Russian oil firms to impact India's energy security
Kathmandu Post.description: New Delhi - The latest round of US sanctions targeting Russian oil companies is expected to force India to reassess its energy import portfolio, according to energy analysts.

Online Khabar.title: रुसी तेल कम्पनीमाथि अमेरिकी प्रतिबन्ध, भारतमा असर
Online Khabar.description: अमेरिकाले रुसी तेल कम्पनीहरूमाथि लगाएको नयाँ प्रतिबन्धले भारतको ऊर्जा आपूर्ति शृङ्खलामा प्रभाव पार्ने विज्ञहरूको अनुमान छ।

Primetime News.title: भारतीय ऊर्जा नीतिमा अमेरिकी प्रतिबन्धको प्रभाव
Primetime News.description: प्राइमटाइम न्यूज, काठमाडौं - अमेरिकाको रूसी तेल कम्पनीमाथिको प्रतिबन्धले भारतको ऊर्जा सुरक्षामा नयाँ चुनौती थपेको छ।

articles.title: Nepal Launches New Earthquake Preparedness Initiative Following Recent Tremors
articles.lead: Kathmandu, Nov 10: Government announces comprehensive earthquake preparedness program after series of tremors across the country.
articles.description: Kathmandu, Nov 10: The Nepal government has launched a nationwide earthquake preparedness initiative following a series of moderate tremors that shook various parts of the country last week. The program includes early warning systems, community training, and infrastructure assessment. Prime Minister announced additional funding for earthquake-resistant construction and emergency response capabilities.
articles.summary: Nepal government launches comprehensive earthquake preparedness program following recent seismic activity across the nation.
keyPoints: New earthquake preparedness initiative launched by Nepal government
Program includes early warning systems and community training
Recent tremors prompt increased focus on disaster preparedness
Additional funding allocated for earthquake-resistant infrastructure
Emergency response capabilities to be enhanced nationwide

eKantipur.title: भूकम्प पूर्वतयारी कार्यक्रम सुरु, सरकारले थाल्यो नयाँ योजना

DC Nepal.title: Government rolls out earthquake preparedness campaign
DC Nepal.description: KATHMANDU - Following recent seismic activities, the government has initiated a comprehensive earthquake preparedness program nationwide.

Online Khabar.title: भूकम्पको जोखिम कम गर्न सरकारी पहल
Online Khabar.description: हालैका भुइँचालोका कारण सरकारले भूकम्प जोखिम न्यूनीकरणका लागि नयाँ कार्यक्रम ल्याएको छ।

Primetime News.description: प्राइमटाइम न्यूज - भूकम्पको जोखिमलाई मध्यनजर गर्दै सरकारले व्यापक सुरक्षा कार्यक्रम शुरु गरेको छ।

articles.title: Nepal's Tourism Industry Shows Strong Recovery Signs Post-Pandemic
articles.lead: Kathmandu, Nov 9: Tourist arrivals increase by 45% compared to last year, signaling robust recovery in Nepal's tourism sector.
articles.description: Kathmandu, Nov 9: Nepal's tourism industry is showing remarkable recovery with tourist arrivals increasing by 45% compared to the same period last year. The Nepal Tourism Board reports that both domestic and international tourism have exceeded pre-pandemic projections. Mountain climbing, trekking, and cultural tours are leading the recovery with strong bookings for the upcoming peak season.
articles.summary: Nepal's tourism sector demonstrates strong recovery with 45% increase in tourist arrivals compared to previous year.
keyPoints: Tourist arrivals up 45% compared to last year's figures
Both domestic and international tourism exceeding projections
Mountain climbing and trekking leading the recovery trend
Strong bookings reported for upcoming peak tourism season
Cultural tours and adventure tourism showing particular growth

Kathmandu Post.title: Tourism bounces back with 45% growth in arrivals
Kathmandu Post.description: The tourism sector is witnessing unprecedented recovery with international arrivals surging by 45 percent compared to last year.

DC Nepal.title: Nepal tourism sees remarkable post-pandemic recovery
DC Nepal.description: KATHMANDU - Tourism industry stakeholders report significant improvement with visitor numbers exceeding pre-pandemic levels.

Online Khabar.title: पर्यटन क्षेत्रमा उल्लेखनीय सुधार, ४५ प्रतिशतले बढे पर्यटक
Online Khabar.description: नेपालको पर्यटन क्षेत्रले कोभिडपछि उल्लेखनीय सुधार देखाएको छ भने पर्यटक आगमनमा ४५ प्रतिशतको वृद्धि भएको छ।

articles.title: Nepal's Tech Sector Embraces AI Revolution with New Innovation Hub
articles.lead: Kathmandu, Nov 8: New AI innovation hub established to support local tech startups and promote artificial intelligence adoption.
articles.description: Kathmandu, Nov 8: Nepal has opened its first dedicated AI innovation hub in the capital, marking a significant milestone in the country's technological advancement. The facility will provide resources, training, and support for local tech startups focusing on artificial intelligence solutions. Government officials emphasize the importance of AI in driving economic growth and digital transformation across various sectors.
articles.summary: Nepal establishes first AI innovation hub to support tech startups and promote artificial intelligence adoption nationwide.
keyPoints: First dedicated AI innovation hub opens in Kathmandu
Facility to support local tech startups and entrepreneurs
Focus on artificial intelligence solutions development
Government emphasizes AI's role in economic growth
Digital transformation initiatives across various sectors planned

Kathmandu Post.description: A new AI innovation hub has been inaugurated in Kathmandu to foster technological advancement and support startups.

DC Nepal.title: AI innovation hub launched to boost tech ecosystem
DC Nepal.description: KATHMANDU - The country's first dedicated artificial intelligence hub aims to accelerate digital transformation.

Primetime News.description: प्राइमटाइम न्यूज - नेपालमा पहिलो एआई केन्द्र स्थापनाले प्रविधि क्षेत्रमा नयाँ आशा जगाएको छ।

articles.title: Nepal Achieves 95% Renewable Energy Target Ahead of Schedule
articles.lead: Kathmandu, Nov 7: Country surpasses renewable energy goals with hydropower and solar installations exceeding expectations.
articles.description: Nepal has achieved 95% renewable energy generation, surpassing its national target three years ahead of schedule. The milestone was reached through significant investments in hydropower projects and solar installations across rural areas. Energy Minister credited public-private partnerships and international support for the remarkable achievement in sustainable energy transition.
articles.summary: Nepal reaches 95% renewable energy generation, achieving national targets three years ahead of planned timeline.
keyPoints: 95% renewable energy generation achieved ahead of schedule
Hydropower and solar installations exceed initial expectations
Significant progress in sustainable energy transition
Public-private partnerships key to success
International support crucial for renewable energy projects

eKantipur.title: नेपालले नवीकरणीय ऊर्जाको लक्ष्य समयअघि नै हासिल

Kathmandu Post.title: Nepal hits renewable energy target three years early
Kathmandu Post.description: The country has achieved its ambitious renewable energy goal of 95 percent generation ahead of the 2028 deadline.

DC Nepal.title: Nepal exceeds renewable energy expectations
DC Nepal.description: KATHMANDU - The nation has surpassed its renewable energy targets with significant hydropower and solar achievements.

Primetime News.title: नवीकरणीय ऊर्जामा नेपालको ऐतिहासिक उपलब्धि
Primetime News.description: प्राइमटाइम न्यूज - नेपालले नवीकरणीय ऊर्जाको क्षेत्रमा विश्वमा उदाहरणीय उपलब्धि हासिल गरेको छ।
